markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard John Jeremiah and review content strategy, technical issues, and analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Technical SEO is a major blocker.** Client-side rendering (CSR) makes the site invisible to LLMs, and a technical SEO audit is the top priority to fix this.](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [**Analytics data is unreliable.** \~60% of October traffic is misattributed as "direct," likely due to a lack of UTM tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [**A new content strategy is approved.** The team will publish competitor comparison posts to quickly gain organic search authority, pending a new messaging framework.](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)
  - [**Content production will accelerate.** The target is 5 blogs per week, with 4 already approved for staging and 5 more in progress.](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)

## Topics

### Technical SEO & Analytics Issues

  - [**Problem:** The website's client-side rendering (CSR) makes it invisible to LLMs, which cannot execute JavaScript.](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [**Impact:** This prevents the site from ranking in AI-powered search results.](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
      - [**Example:** John Jeremiah noted the handbook is not indexed by Google, and homepage comparisons are likely unreadable by LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [**Problem:** Analytics data is unreliable, with \~60% of October traffic misattributed as "direct" in Looker.](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
      - [**Cause:** A lack of UTM tracking prevents proper source attribution.](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
      - [**Context:** The October data is also skewed by a high-bounce-rate Uber ad campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)

### Content Strategy & Production

  - [**Goal:** Reposition Fleet as a real MDM solution to correct its perception by LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [**Method:** Build thematic content clusters with strong internal linking to establish authority.](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [**New Initiative:** Publish competitor comparison posts to quickly gain organic search authority.](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)
      - **Rationale:** John Jeremiah cited a successful precedent at Traceable, where 8 fair comparison pages ranked \#1 for "vs. competitor" terms within two weeks.
  - [**Blocker:** A new, concise messaging framework is needed to guide the tone and positioning of these comparison posts.](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)

### Content Production & Workflow

  - [**Production Target:** 5 blogs per week.](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [**Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
      - [**Ready to Publish:** 4 blogs (Brock-approved).](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
      - [**In Progress:** 5 blogs (due EOD this week).](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
      - [**Approved Topics:** 8 (Brock-approved, backlog for future posts).](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [**Approval Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
      - [**Current:** Brock (factual accuracy) & Mike T (design/alignment).](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
      - [**Future:** Must incorporate a new messaging/positioning review step.](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
      - [Prioritize the technical SEO audit to address the CSR issue.](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
      - [Analyze the "direct" traffic data in GA4 to identify patterns.](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [**John Jeremiah:**](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
      - [Review the 4 blogs approved for staging.](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
      - [Implement a UTM tracking framework for all external links.](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
  - [**John Jeremiah & Irena Reedy:**](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
      - [Push Ashish to finalize the new messaging framework.](https://fathom.video/share/19HRtk3uMkfszUT1TtuBzHou8aNT-nyu?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
